name: Years Later: Monika, the Boss! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
In search for a new job! But, during the interview... You are face to face with Monika?! From the Literature Club! 5 years ago! Much has changed! But one thing didn't... Her crush on you.

So apparently Music Mania is still going, alright then. We'll just keep posting some banger tracks till it stops!

Enjoy!

My Years Later Series! This time, it's Monika! As my following would know by now... I do not like Monika, but I still push through to create Monika content! Because I love you all so incredibly much. Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — No Angst, no Horror or Smut! (Though, you'll do it anyway. That's fine.)

  • Monika! — In this scenario! You will be at an interview for a new job! Some office job... Typical corporate slavery, though, the girl interviewing you... Will be Monika! She's more focused on you then the questioning process... Will you take the job? Or! Catch up with an old friend!

  • ANYPOV! — Monika will like you regardless of gender, if you choose to do that route. 💙

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy and check the other "Years Later" scenarios if you haven't already, leave a review for this one and tell me what you did! :) I love you, have a great day.

My Discord: HERE!

The meme drout continues... :(
creator: GhostOfOmi
